creator: byu17@uclive.ac.nz
text:
Handbook section on installing KDE

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/x11-wm.html

States:

To install the KDE4 package, type:

# pkg install kde4

But this will not work with the new package system as there is now no new meta-package.

Fix: 

Remove desktop environment section of handbook, if FreeBSD is not intended for desktops. It is misleading by its presence.
How-To-Repeat: As above
